1:
OTUS CHAOS LEAGUE RESET
Winners added to the tables
From now to the 1st of June we start a new league where the 1st and 2nd in the Otus Chaos leaderboard will get their names in the entrance tablets.
Hardcore and Otus Chaos leaderboards reset

Brontes

Fixed Brontes knockback stopping its AI/Abilities
Added reverb in Brontes Arena
Improved camera shake, audio and VFX in Brontes knockdown

Atlanteans

Fixed a camera shake that will persist after death
Charged Slam won't hit players and/or enemies if there is blocking object
Shockwave won't hit players and/or enemies if there is blocking object
Material improvement to see better its skin damage and difficulty
Improved the emmisives to adjust to different exposition levels
Valvida is destroyed instanly after death to avoid flickering
Head stops tracking after death

Biomes

Weather SFX are now premixed with a dynamic filter overlapped SFX don't have volume spikes.
Collision improvements in some grounds

UI

Made the menu patchnotes text to wrap in the size box.
Made all the backgrounds to use the same palette unifying materials.

Combat

Biopiercer base damage increased from 2.2 to 2.3
Septum base damage increased from 1.6 to 1.7
